mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_whitelist ( whitelist_type, whitelist_value, whitelist_desc, status, is_del, creator_id, creator_name ) VALUES ( #{whitelistType}, #{whitelistValue}, #{whitelistDesc}, #{status}, 0, #{creatorId}, #{creatorName} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user_whitelist SET whitelist_type = #{whitelistType}, whitelist_value = #{whitelistValue}, whitelist_desc = #{whitelistDesc}, status = #{status} WHERE whitelist_id = #{whitelistId} AND is_del = 0
